_comment: BEACON-managed Claude Code hooks. Re-installed by `beacon upgrade`. Disable specific hooks via doctor.toml's [hooks] disabled = [...].

PostToolUse._purpose: auto-lint after Claude edits — runs the project's lint+format on the touched file (only under src/ or tests/)

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r .tool_input.file_path); case "$FILE" in src/*|tests/*) uv run ruff check --fix && uv run ruff format ;; esac

PostToolUse._purpose: auto-doctor after `beacon bullet finish` — surfaces drift the moment a bullet closes

hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); case "$CMD" in *"beacon bullet finish"*) beacon doctor || true ;; esac

PostToolUse._purpose: auto-roadmap — regenerates ROADMAP.md when epic or bullet state changes; disable via doctor.toml [hooks] disabled = ["auto-roadmap"]

hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); case "$CMD" in *"beacon epic new"*|*"beacon epic finish"*|*"beacon epic archive"*|*"beacon bullet finish"*) beacon roadmap export || true ;; esac

PostToolUse._purpose: auto-audit (post) — nudges toward /beacon.audit after an epic is stubbed (design moment) or a spec lands (build moment, opt-in). Tune which moments fire via doctor.toml [audit] moments; disable entirely via [hooks] disabled = ["auto-audit"]

PreToolUse._purpose: auto-audit (pre) — nudges toward /beacon.audit before `beacon epic finish` seals an epic (ship moment). Tune via doctor.toml [audit] moments; disable via [hooks] disabled = ["auto-audit"]
manifest write-protect — `project-management/.beacon/init-options.json` is BEACON-owned; route changes through `beacon init/upgrade` so versioning + drift checks stay accurate

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r .tool_input.file_path); case "$FILE" in *project-management/.beacon/init-options.json) echo 'beacon: refusing to edit the BEACON manifest directly. Use `beacon init` / `beacon upgrade` instead.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
